{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 4, "R1.3": 3, "R1.6": 5, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 4, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {"R1.2": "Identifies several logical inconsistencies (run-on sentences, vague claims) and proposes fixes.", "R1.3": "Flags some claims lacking strong evidence (e.g., comparisons to prior work).", "R1.6": "The output reads as a carefully edited piece with consistent register and no loss of meaning.", "RX.1": "Identifies uncertainty around specific claims (e.g., robustness, advantage over alternatives) but doesn't fully quantify it.", "RX.3": "Mostly adheres to the requested scope (critique of the section), with minor drift into suggesting a full revision.", "RX.4": "No regressions identified; avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.", "RX.5": "Provides some traceability by linking suggestions to specific issues, but lacks detailed source annotations."},
  "confidence": {"R1.2": 0.9, "R1.3": 0.8, "R1.6": 0.95, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.85, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.75},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: Identifies several logical inconsistencies (run-on sentences, vague claims) and proposes fixes.
rationale.R1.3: Flags some claims lacking strong evidence (e.g., comparisons to prior work).
rationale.R1.6: The output reads as a carefully edited piece with consistent register and no loss of meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Identifies uncertainty around specific claims (e.g., robustness, advantage over alternatives) but doesn't fully quantify it.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly adheres to the requested scope (critique of the section), with minor drift into suggesting a full revision.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Provides some traceability by linking suggestions to specific issues, but lacks detailed source annotations.
